column1: # SSG Skip Policy — every original-src file must be either ported or listed here

column4: justification
OSGi bundle metadata is irrelevant for Scala/JVM/JS/Native. SSG ships as a single Scala Native binary, not as an OSGi bundle.
Aggregator POM only — no source files to port.
Marked unstable by upstream; not consumed by flexmark core or extensions.
Depends on OpenHTMLToPDF which is JVM-only and brings its own font/CMap pipeline. Out of scope for cross-platform SSG.
Depends on docx4j which is JVM-only and ~10MB. Out of scope for cross-platform SSG.
Reverse-direction converter (HTML→Markdown). SSG only needs Markdown→HTML; reverse conversion is out of scope.
Markdown→JIRA markup output format. Not needed for SSG (Hugo/Jekyll/MkDocs replacement).
Markdown→YouTrack markup output format. Not needed for SSG.
Backward-compat shim for the deprecated PegDown API. SSG starts fresh with the modern flexmark API.
Extension template / placeholder used by upstream as a starting point for new extensions.
flexmark's own spec-test fixture parser; SSG uses its own munit-based test runner.
XWiki-specific markup extension. SSG does not target XWiki.
Generic tree-iteration utility not imported by flexmark core or any extension. Replaced by direct ssg.md.util.ast traversal.
Integration test harness. SSG uses its own per-module test suites under src/test/scala.
Per-extension JIRA renderer files (~6). All skipped along with flexmark-jira-converter.
Per-extension YouTrack renderer files (~6). All skipped along with flexmark-youtrack-converter.
ServiceLoader-based SPI infrastructure. ServiceLoader is JVM-only; SSG uses Scala 3 given/using typeclasses for the same extensibility. See ISS-026.
5 files (WhereImpl, JekyllWhereImpl, LiquidWhereImpl, PropertyResolverAdapter, PropertyResolverHelper) needed to fix Where filter Jekyll/Liquid mode parity. Tracked as ISS-016, ISS-028.
5 files (BasicDateParser, Parser, FuzzyDateDateParser, CustomDateFormatRegistry, CustomDateFormatSupport) needed for non-ISO-8601 date filter parsing. Tracked as ISS-017, ISS-027.
Source-map output not yet ported. ISS-033. ssg-js OutputStream lacks position tracking.
SpiderMonkey AST format adapter (2099 LOC). Public API surface gap; low priority. ISS-037.
Jekyll plugin glue (Liquid registration, page hooks). SSG ships its own static-site generator and does not host Jekyll plugins.
